title: USB Dir Sync
subtitle: USB-triggered directory synchronization utility
description: A utility that combines USB detection with directory synchronization so file copy tasks can begin when a target drive is connected.
Built to reduce manual backup steps and make portable sync workflows easier to run.
features: Directory sync triggered by device connection
Portable backup workflow with less manual setup
statusDetails: Combined USB and sync workflow still being defined
Integration details may change as the project develops
Project documentation has not been fully written yet
